amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 3 — paragraph 1 — point 44 k (new)
parliament_text:
(44k) ‘social scoring’ means evaluating or classifying natural persons based on their social behaviour, socio-economic status or known or predicted personal or personality characteristics;

‘social scoring’ means evaluating or classifying natural persons based on their social behaviour, socio-economic status or known or predicted personal or personality characteristics;
